surprises: The MCP benchmark showing such dramatic accuracy differences between integration approaches — most tools are failing silently in ways developers don't realize.
observations: I'm seeing a clear shift from single-agent generation stories to multi-agent orchestration challenges, which suggests the field is maturing past the initial hype phase.
emotional_reactions: Frustrated by how many coordination problems are being treated as solved when they're clearly not — the gap between demo and production feels wider than ever.
